notes: Landing redesign + ENTER fix. (1) ENTER now works: the landing-to-app handoff moved from sessionStorage (iOS dropped it across the jump, bouncing users back) to a URL flag (dct-ios.html?from=landing) that always survives; dct-ios.html's front-door guard checks the flag. (2) Single-screen landing: removed the seven status rows and hid clutter, KEPT the power-topology graphic, and made ENTER the hero centered in the lower half so the page fits one screen with no scroll. Three stamps aligned at v1.6.68.
